summary:
Failed (routing_404): TEST FAILURE

Clicking the 'Proses Pengembalian' button did not open a return-processing form or show a success message — the app returned a 404 error page instead.

Observations:
- The UI navigated to /peminjaman/kembali/194b74c1-379f-418e-a079-b83180432f03 and displayed '404 This page could not be found.'
- No return-processing form or success notification appeared after clicking 'Proses Pengembalian'.
